title: The Silver Standard of the Duke of Edinburgh's International Award
issuer: The Duke of Edinburgh's International Award : The Silver Standard
description: Earned the Silver Duke of Edinburgh's International Award through sustained commitment to volunteer work, skill building, and physical fitness. The program culminated in a challenging multi-day team expedition in Cox's Bazar, demonstrating adaptability, teamwork, and leadership in outdoor environments.

title: The Bronze Standard of the Duke of Edinburgh's International Award
issuer: The Duke of Edinburgh's International Award : The Bronze Standard
description: Earned the Bronze Duke of Edinburgh's International Award after completing a 6-month program focused on personal development. Demonstrated commitment, time management, and resilience through weekly voluntary service, physical recreation, and skill-building activities, culminating in a team expedition.

title: Champion
description: Achieved the Champion title in the "Badhonhara 3" Interdepartmental Cultural Competition, demonstrating creative excellence and strong performance skills.

title: Finalist
issuer: The Case Gambit Case Competition (KUET EEE)
description: Secured a finalist position representing team FORTIS in The Case Gambit, a prestigious business case competition organized by the Department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering at KUET.
